scene_description: 主人公たちが渡る、宇治川にかかる象徴的な橋。作中に頻繁に登場する。
intro_short_en: PLACEHOLDER — write 2-3 friendly sentences for tourists in English.
access_note: 京阪宇治駅から徒歩約3分

scene_description: 作品の舞台のモデルとされる街並み。坂道や駅前が登場する。
intro_short_en: PLACEHOLDER — write 2-3 friendly sentences for tourists in English.
access_note: 阪急甲陽園駅周辺

scene_description: 商店街そのものが舞台のモデル。アーケードや店先が作中に登場する。
intro_short_en: PLACEHOLDER — write 2-3 friendly sentences for tourists in English.
access_note: 京阪出町柳駅から徒歩約5分

anime_title_ja: りゅうおうのおしごと！
anime_title_en: The Ryuo's Work is Never Done!
scene_description: 新世界のシンボル・通天閣周辺が、将棋を題材にした本作の重要な舞台として登場する。
intro_short_en: Tsutenkaku is the retro symbol of Osaka's Shinsekai district and a key backdrop in this shogi-themed anime. The lively, old-school streets around it are great for soaking up classic Osaka atmosphere.
access_note: 地下鉄堺筋線 恵美須町駅から徒歩約5分

scene_description: 日本一長い商店街として知られ、作中で周辺の街並みが背景に多く使われた。
intro_short_en: Said to be Japan's longest covered shopping street, this 2.6km arcade appears in the Monogatari series. It's a fun place to eat your way through local Osaka snacks while spotting familiar scenery.
access_note: 地下鉄 北浜駅・南森町駅などから徒歩圏

scene_description: 大阪ディビジョン「どついたれ本舗」ゆかりの地。道頓堀や新世界がMV等に登場する。
intro_short_en: Dotonbori's neon-lit canal is one of Osaka's most iconic sights and is tied to the city's division in Hypnosis Mic. Come for the giant signs, street food, and unmistakable Osaka energy.
access_note: 地下鉄 なんば駅から徒歩約5分

scene_description: 服部平次が活躍する大阪編や劇場版で、大阪城周辺が背景として登場する。
intro_short_en: Osaka Castle is a must-see historic landmark that shows up in Detective Conan's Osaka-set stories. The surrounding park is spacious and especially lovely during cherry blossom season.
access_note: JR大阪城公園駅から徒歩約15分
hours: Castle tower 9:00–17:00 (last entry 16:30) · Daily · Park always open

spot_name_ja: 大阪府立中之島図書館
scene_description: 「ナニワの連続殺人事件」編で登場。西洋風建築と螺旋階段が印象的。
intro_short_en: This elegant Meiji-era library with western-style architecture and a striking spiral staircase appears in a Detective Conan case. It's a photogenic stop right in the middle of Osaka's Nakanoshima island.
access_note: 京阪 なにわ橋駅から徒歩約1分

scene_description: ラストで主人公二人が再会する階段（男坂）の舞台。ポスターのキービジュアルにも使われた。
intro_short_en: The staircase at Suga Shrine is where the two leads finally reunite at the end of Your Name, and it featured on the film's poster. Stand at the top for the same view of the Yotsuya streets.
access_note: 東京メトロ 四谷三丁目駅から徒歩約7分

scene_description: メンバー・東條希の実家という設定で登場。境内裏の「男坂」を駆け上がる練習シーンが有名。
intro_short_en: A 1,300-year-old shrine near Akihabara that serves as a key Love Live! location and often hosts anime collaborations. The long stone steps of the 'Otoko-zaka' are instantly recognizable to fans.
access_note: JR御茶ノ水駅から徒歩約5分

scene_description: 下北沢を舞台にしたバンドアニメで、駅前や周辺のライブハウス・店舗が数多く登場する。
intro_short_en: Shimokitazawa is the live-music neighborhood at the heart of Bocchi the Rock!, with the station area appearing again and again. It's a great base for exploring the district's venues, thrift shops, and cafes.
access_note: 京王・小田急 下北沢駅すぐ

anime_title_ja: シュタインズ・ゲート
scene_description: 漆原るかの実家のモデル。岡部倫太郎も訪れる、秋葉原近くの聖地。
intro_short_en: A small, atmospheric shrine near Akihabara that appears in Steins;Gate. It's an easy detour to combine with exploring Akihabara's electronics and anime shops.
access_note: JR秋葉原駅から徒歩約5分

anime_title_ja: 美少女戦士セーラームーン
scene_description: 火野レイ（セーラーマーズ）の実家「火川神社」のモデルとされる神社。
intro_short_en: This shrine in the international Azabu area is the model for Rei Hino's family shrine in Sailor Moon. The stone torii gate looks much as it does in the series.
access_note: 東京メトロ 六本木駅から徒歩約10分

scene_description: 柊姉妹の家のモデルとされ、アニメ聖地巡礼文化の発祥の地のひとつとして知られる。
intro_short_en: One of the birthplaces of modern anime pilgrimage, this ancient shrine inspired the Hiiragi sisters' home in Lucky Star. Fans still leave illustrated 'ema' prayer plaques here today.
access_note: 東武伊勢崎線 鷲宮駅から徒歩約8分

anime_title_ja: あの日見た花の名前を僕達はまだ知らない。
anime_title_en: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
scene_description: オープニングやポスターに描かれた象徴的な橋。キャラクターたちが集った印象的なスポット。
intro_short_en: This bridge in Chichibu is one of Anohana's most iconic locations, featured in the opening and on posters. The surrounding river valley scenery is beautiful in every season.
access_note: 秩父鉄道 秩父駅からバス・自転車等（駅から約4km）

anime_title_ja: あの日見た花の名前を僕達はまだ知らない。
anime_title_en: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
scene_description: オープニングに登場する公園。見晴らしの丘から秩父の街を見下ろせる。
intro_short_en: A hilltop park featured in Anohana's opening, with sweeping views over Chichibu. It's also famous for its spring carpet of pink moss phlox.
access_note: 西武秩父線 横瀬駅から徒歩約20分

scene_description: 主人公とヒロインが訪れる神社として登場。縁結びの神社として知られる。
intro_short_en: Set in the retro 'Little Edo' town of Kawagoe, this shrine appears in the gentle romance Tsuki ga Kirei and is known for matchmaking. Pair it with a stroll through Kawagoe's historic warehouse streets.
access_note: JR・東武 川越駅からバス約10分

scene_description: 登山をテーマにした本作で主人公たちが登る山。飯能市は作品の中心的な舞台。
intro_short_en: An easy beginner's mountain in Hanno that the characters climb in this hiking-themed anime. The short trail rewards you with a nice view, perfect for a relaxed half-day visit.
access_note: 西武池袋線 飯能駅から登山口まで徒歩約20分
hours: Open daily · Recommended sunrise to sunset

spot_name_ja: 稲毛海浜公園（いなげの浜）
anime_title_ja: やはり俺の青春ラブコメはまちがっている。
scene_description: 千葉市を舞台にした本作で繰り返し登場する海辺。広大な人工海浜と公園が広がる。
intro_short_en: A wide seaside park in Chiba that appears throughout Oregairu. The artificial beach and open coastal views make it a relaxing, photogenic stop.
access_note: JR京葉線 稲毛海岸駅から徒歩約15分

anime_title_ja: やはり俺の青春ラブコメはまちがっている。
scene_description: 作品屈指の名シーンの舞台。夕暮れに東京湾を一望できる橋。
intro_short_en: One of Oregairu's most emotionally important locations, this bridge overlooks Tokyo Bay and glows orange at sunset, just like in the series. A quietly moving spot for fans.
access_note: JR京葉線 検見川浜駅からバス・徒歩

anime_title_ja: やはり俺の青春ラブコメはまちがっている。
scene_description: 告白回や初詣シーンで登場する、物語の重要な舞台のひとつ。
intro_short_en: This shrine appears in key Oregairu scenes, including a memorable confession episode. It's a peaceful, leafy spot a short walk from Keisei Inage Station.
access_note: 京成千葉線 京成稲毛駅から徒歩約3分

anime_title_ja: 俺の妹がこんなに可愛いわけがない
scene_description: 千葉市の象徴的なランドマーク。『俺妹』『俺ガイル』など複数作品に登場する。
intro_short_en: A 125m landmark on Chiba's waterfront that appears in several anime including Oreimo. The observation deck gives nice views over Tokyo Bay.
access_note: JR・千葉都市モノレール 千葉みなと駅から徒歩約12分

anime_title_ja: 俺の妹がこんなに可愛いわけがない
scene_description: オープニング映像などで度々登場する大きな公園。
intro_short_en: A spacious park that shows up repeatedly in Oreimo, including the opening. Easy to reach by monorail and pleasant for a relaxed walk around the pond.
access_note: 千葉都市モノレール 千葉公園駅すぐ

anime_title_ja: 青春ブタ野郎はバニーガール先輩の夢を見ない
anime_title_en: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
scene_description: 思春期症候群と呼ばれる超常現象をテーマにした作品。作中の背景としてこの海岸が登場する。また、現実においても江ノ島を一望できる場所でもある。
intro_short_en: Kugenuma Beach is a relaxed stretch of Shonan coastline with sweeping views of Enoshima Island, and it appears as a backdrop in 'Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai.' It's especially lovely around sunset, when the sky over the water lights up. Many fans enjoy a slow walk along the shore to take in the same scenery featured in the series.
access_note: 江ノ電鵠沼海岸駅から徒歩約3分

spot_name_ja: 横浜ランドマークタワー
anime_title_ja: 文豪ストレイドッグス
scene_description: 異能力者たちがバトルを繰り広げるアクションアニメ。実際の横浜ランドマークタワーが、作中の背景として使用される。
intro_short_en: This iconic skyscraper anchors the Minato Mirai skyline and appears as a backdrop in 'Bungo Stray Dogs.' Visitors can ride up to the observation deck for panoramic views of Yokohama's harbor. It pairs nicely with a longer stroll around the surrounding waterfront district.
access_note: みなとみらい線みなとみらい駅から徒歩約3分

scene_description: カーレースアニメで、後期においてこの場所が登場する。神奈川の強豪チームとの戦いが描かれる舞台である。
intro_short_en: This winding mountain road through Hakone is well known to 'Initial D' fans for its tight hairpin turns, which feature in the series' later racing arcs. The switchbacks climb through forest with occasional valley views. It's still an active public road, so visitors exploring on foot or by car should take care.
access_note: 箱根湯本駅からバスでアクセス、七曲り付近で下車

scene_description: 自転車競技を題材にしたアニメであり、作中におけるレースコースとして実際の国道134号周辺が登場する。
intro_short_en: Running along the Shonan coastline, Route 134 is the scenic road that inspired race-course scenes in 'Yowamushi Pedal.' Many cyclists ride sections of it themselves to enjoy the same ocean views as the show's characters. It links several beach towns, so it's easy to break the route into a relaxed half-day ride or walk.
nearest_station: Enoden Line stations along the coast (e.g. Koshigoe, Shichirigahama)
access_note: 江ノ電沿線各駅からアクセス可能（鵠沼海岸駅・七里ヶ浜駅など）

anime_title_ja: 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン
scene_description: 日本を代表するSFロボットアニメです。現実の箱根町周辺が、作中における第3新東京市の舞台として設定・使用されています。
intro_short_en: As the gateway to the Hakone hot-spring district, this station is closely associated with 'Neon Genesis Evangelion,' which drew on the surrounding town as inspiration for the fictional Tokyo-3. Visitors can wander the nearby streets before continuing on to Hakone's onsen and mountain scenery. It's a relaxed way to combine an anime-themed visit with a regular Hakone day trip.
access_note: 新宿駅から小田急ロマンスカーで約85分

spot_name_en: JR Kawasaki Station East Exit Plaza
anime_title_ja: ガールズバンドクライ
scene_description: 主人公の仁菜と桃香が初めて出会う運命的な場所。桃香が路上ライブを行う場所でもあり、第1話のクライマックスをはじめ作中で何度も登場する広場である。
intro_short_en: This open plaza right outside Kawasaki Station's east exit is where Nina and Momoka first cross paths in 'Girls Band Cry.' It's also where Momoka performs her street gigs, making it a recurring backdrop throughout the series, including the climax of episode one. Fans often stop by just to stand where the story begins.
access_note: JR川崎駅東口から徒歩約1分

anime_title_ja: 恋は雨上がりのように
scene_description: アニメ第3話で、主人公のあきらとバイト先の店長である近藤が立ち寄る高台の公園のモデル。二人の微妙な距離感と静かな時間が描かれている。
intro_short_en: This hilltop park is believed to be the model for the quiet park where Akira and her manager Kondo spend time together in episode 3 of 'After the Rain.' Its calm, elevated setting matches the gentle, understated mood of their scenes. It's a peaceful stop if you'd like to see a quieter, residential side of the Kawasaki area.
access_note: 武蔵中原駅からバスまたは徒歩でアクセス

scene_description: 人類侵略を目論むイカ娘が居候して働く海の家れもんの舞台である。
intro_short_en: Yuigahama Beach is the real-world setting behind the fictional beach house 'Lemon,' where the invasion-minded Squid Girl ends up working in this comedy series. The beach itself is a relaxed, popular spot in Kamakura with views toward Enoshima. It makes for an easy add-on to a Kamakura day trip.
access_note: 江ノ電由比ヶ浜駅から徒歩約5分

spot_name_ja: 新横浜プリンスホテル・プリンスペペ
anime_title_en: The Vampire Dies in No Time
scene_description: 作中では、新横浜ヴリンスホテルとして度々登場する新横浜のランドマーク。現実のホテルでも公式のコラボ宿泊プランが開催されるなど、ファンの聖地となっています。
intro_short_en: This Shin-Yokohama landmark appears repeatedly in 'The Vampire Dies in No Time' as a lightly fictionalized version of itself. The real hotel has leaned into its anime fame with official collaboration stay plans, making it a genuine pilgrimage spot for fans. It's conveniently located right by Shin-Yokohama Station.
access_note: 新横浜駅から徒歩約3分

spot_name_ja: 横浜ランドマークタワー
scene_description: 特殊能力者ミニマムホルダーたちが活躍する横浜の象徴。第1話やオープニング映像などで、展望台から見下ろす横浜の夜景や街並みが描かれている。
intro_short_en: Yokohama Landmark Tower stands in as a symbol of the city in 'Hamatora,' home to the special-ability-using Minimum Holders. The night skyline seen from its observation deck in the first episode and opening sequence is something visitors can recreate in person. It's a great stop for fans who also want classic Yokohama harbor views.
access_note: みなとみらい線みなとみらい駅から徒歩約3分

scene_description: 鎌倉・鶴岡八幡宮の東にある歴史ある神社で、オープニング映像や第3話でのよさこいの練習シーンの舞台として描かれている。
intro_short_en: This historic shrine just east of Kamakura's famous Tsurugaoka Hachimangu appears in 'Hanayamata's' opening sequence and in a yosakoi dance-practice scene in episode 3. The quiet shrine grounds offer a calmer alternative to Kamakura's busier sightseeing spots. It pairs well with a visit to the main shrine nearby.
access_note: JR鎌倉駅からバスまたは徒歩約20分

scene_description: 原作者のゆかりの地として作品のメイン舞台に選ばれた街の駅。作中のレトロな喫茶店「方舟」の雰囲気を彷彿とさせるノスタルジックな舞台であり、過去には大倉山公園梅林で公式イベントも開催された。
intro_short_en: Okurayama Station was chosen as the main setting of 'Summer Storm!' because of its connection to the original creator, and the area's old-fashioned streets echo the nostalgic feel of the show's fictional cafe 'Hakobune.' The nearby Okurayama Park plum grove has even hosted official tie-in events in the past. It's a low-key, neighborhood spot for fans looking beyond Yokohama's more famous sights.
access_note: 東急東横線大倉山駅すぐ。大倉山公園梅林までは徒歩約15分

spot_name_ja: 浩庵キャンプ場・本栖湖
scene_description: 志摩リンとなでしこが初めて出会う、第1話の象徴的なキャンプ地。富士山と本栖湖を望む湖畔が作中に登場する。
intro_short_en: Kouan Campground on Lake Motosu is one of the defining locations of Laid-Back Camp, where Rin and Nadeshiko first meet. The lakeside view of Mt. Fuji is the classic image fans come here to see, especially on clear mornings.
access_note: 身延駅または河口湖駅からバス・車でアクセス。キャンプ場内は利用ルールを確認
hours: Campground hours vary by season and reservation

scene_description: 各務原なでしこが通学で使う駅のモデル。第1話の身延線沿線シーンに登場する。
intro_short_en: Utsubuna Station is the quiet JR Minobu Line stop associated with Nadeshiko's school commute. It is a small, everyday location, but that ordinary feeling is exactly what makes it charming for Laid-Back Camp fans.
access_note: JR身延線 内船駅すぐ

scene_description: 身延町散策や買い物の拠点としてファンに親しまれるエリア。作品ゆかりの町歩きに使いやすい玄関口。
intro_short_en: Minobu Station is a useful gateway for exploring Laid-Back Camp locations around Minobu. The station area works well as a gentle starting point before heading toward the town streets, temples, and lakeside camp spots.
access_note: JR身延線 身延駅周辺

scene_description: 野クルの山梨キャンプ回で立ち寄る公園のモデル。甲府盆地を見下ろす夜景スポットとしても知られる。
intro_short_en: Fuefukigawa Fruit Park is a bright hillside park overlooking the Kofu Basin, and it appears in Laid-Back Camp as part of the girls' Yamanashi outing. Come during the day for the gardens or near evening for wide valley views.
access_note: JR山梨市駅からタクシー・バスでアクセス

scene_description: 笛吹川フルーツ公園近くの温泉。作中の山梨キャンプ旅で印象的な温泉立ち寄りスポットとして知られる。
intro_short_en: Hottarakashi Onsen is a fan-favorite hot spring stop near Fuefukigawa Fruit Park. The open-air baths face the Kofu Basin and Mt. Fuji, making it a satisfying pilgrimage stop even for visitors who simply want a good soak.
access_note: JR山梨市駅から車・タクシーで約10分
hours: Usually opens before sunrise · Check official hours

scene_description: 静かな湖畔キャンプ地として作中に登場。山あいの落ち着いた雰囲気が印象的なスポット。
intro_short_en: Lake Shibire is a small mountain lake with a calm, tucked-away atmosphere. It is a memorable Laid-Back Camp location for fans who want a quieter lakeside camping mood away from the bigger Fuji Five Lakes area.
access_note: JR市川本町駅から車・タクシーでアクセス。湖畔施設の営業状況を確認
hours: Lake area always open · Campground hours vary

scene_description: 大洗町の玄関口。ラッピング列車や町内散策の出発点として、ガルパン巡礼の定番拠点になっている。
intro_short_en: Oarai Station is the natural starting point for a Girls und Panzer walk through town. Fans often arrive here before heading to the shopping streets, seaside spots, and official displays around Oarai.
access_note: 鹿島臨海鉄道 大洗駅すぐ

scene_description: 大洗のランドマーク。館内にはガルパンコラボ喫茶「Panzer Vor」があり、町の景色を見渡せる。
intro_short_en: Oarai Marine Tower is one of the town's easiest landmarks to spot and a staple of Girls und Panzer sightseeing. The tower also hosts the Panzer Vor collaboration cafe, making it a practical fan stop with a view.
access_note: 大洗駅から徒歩約15分
hours: Tower and cafe hours vary · Panzer Vor usually closed Tuesday

spot_name_ja: 大洗ガルパンギャラリー
scene_description: 大洗シーサイドステーション内の展示・グッズ拠点。大洗とガルパンの歩みを知れるファン向けスポット。
intro_short_en: The Oarai Garupan Gallery inside Oarai Seaside Station is a compact hub for displays, goods, and local Girls und Panzer history. It is an easy stop to pair with the nearby Marine Tower and waterfront.
access_note: 大洗駅から徒歩約15分。大洗シーサイドステーション2F

spot_name_ja: 大洗磯前神社・神磯の鳥居
scene_description: 大洗を代表する海辺の神社と鳥居。作中の町並み巡礼とあわせて訪れやすい景勝地。
intro_short_en: Oarai Isosaki Shrine and the wave-splashed Kamiiso-no-Torii are among Oarai's most striking real-world sights. For Girls und Panzer fans, it adds a scenic seaside stop to a town walk full of familiar landmarks.
access_note: 大洗駅からバス・徒歩でアクセス。海岸部は足元に注意

spot_name_ja: 割烹旅館 肴屋本店
scene_description: 市街地戦シーンで戦車が突っ込む宿のモデルとして知られる、大洗商店街の象徴的な巡礼スポット。
intro_short_en: Sakanaya Honten is a long-running inn that Girls und Panzer fans know from one of the town battle's most memorable moments. It sits within the walkable shopping-street area, so it is best visited respectfully as part of a broader stroll.
access_note: 大洗駅から徒歩圏。営業中の旅館なので見学・撮影は配慮して訪問
hours: Private inn · Visit respectfully from public areas

scene_description: 甲府駅北口近くのレトロな商業エリア。甲府市周辺を舞台にした『mono』巡礼の立ち寄りスポットとして紹介されている。
intro_short_en: Koshu Yume Koji is a retro-styled shopping lane just north of Kofu Station and a convenient stop for mono fans exploring central Kofu. Its brick paths, small shops, and local snacks make it easy to fold into a casual photo walk.
access_note: JR甲府駅北口から徒歩約3分

scene_description: 公式コラボの聖地巡礼マップで紹介されている甲府の高台スポット。甲府盆地の景色も楽しめる。
intro_short_en: The Yamanashi Prefectural Science Center appears on the official mono pilgrimage map as one of the Kofu-area sightseeing stops. Its hillside location gives visitors a broad view over the city, which fits the show's camera-and-weekend-outing spirit.
access_note: JR甲府駅からバスまたは車でアクセス
hours: Check facility hours and closed days

scene_description: 公式コラボの聖地巡礼マップで紹介される、甲斐市の駅スポット。特徴的な駅舎と周辺の景色が楽しめる。
intro_short_en: Ryuo Station is listed on the official mono pilgrimage map and is known for its distinctive modern station building. It is a simple but photogenic stop west of central Kofu for fans following the broader Yamanashi route.
access_note: JR中央本線 竜王駅すぐ

scene_description: 公式コラボの聖地巡礼マップで紹介されている景色のよい公園。甲府盆地を見渡す撮影向きのスポット。
intro_short_en: Fuefukigawa Fruit Park is also part of the official mono Yamanashi route, where it works beautifully as a camera-friendly viewpoint. The open lawns, glass domes, and valley panorama make it a natural fit for a series about weekend photo outings.
access_note: JR山梨市駅からタクシー・バスでアクセス

scene_description: アニメ第2話で、釘崎野薔薇が東京へ向かうシーンで登場。彼女の旅立ちを描いた印象的な場所である。
intro_short_en: Morioka Station marks the beginning of Nobara Kugisaki's journey to Tokyo in episode 2 of 'Jujutsu Kaisen,' making it a memorable scene of departure and determination. The station's concourse is easily recognisable from the anime, and fans often stop to recreate the moment before continuing their own travels. The surrounding city centre is also worth a short walk if time allows.
access_note: JR盛岡駅構内・駅前広場

scene_description: 竈門炭治郎と禰豆子の出身地として設定されており、アニメ第1話の始まりの舞台となった場所である。
intro_short_en: Mt. Kumotori, the highest peak in Tokyo Prefecture, is the setting for the Kamado siblings' mountain home village and the very opening of 'Demon Slayer.' The forested trails and snow-dusted ridgeline vistas echo the world fans first see in episode 1. It's a challenging but rewarding full-day hike that rewards dedicated pilgrims with stunning scenery.
access_note: JR青梅線奥多摩駅からバスで留浦バス停下車、登山口まで徒歩。往復約10時間の本格登山

scene_description: 物語の舞台となる雛見沢村のモデルとして設定された村落。合掌造りの景観が作中そのままに広がっている。
intro_short_en: The UNESCO World Heritage village of Shirakawa-go, with its iconic gassho-zukuri thatched-roof farmhouses, served as the direct model for the isolated village of Hinamizawa in 'Higurashi: When They Cry.' The rural landscape and mountain-ringed seclusion feel strikingly true to the anime's atmosphere, especially at dusk. It's one of Japan's most atmospheric pilgrimage destinations, where genuine historic beauty and eerie anime nostalgia perfectly overlap.
nearest_station: Shirakawa-go Bus Terminal (highway bus from Nagoya/Kanazawa/Takayama)
access_note: 高速バスで白川郷バスターミナル下車。名古屋から約2時間、金沢から約1時間15分

scene_description: アニメの前期オープニングや本編において、東雲研究所がある周辺の舞台として登場する場所である。
intro_short_en: The area around Isesaki Station features in both the early opening sequence and main episodes of 'Nichijou – My Ordinary Life' as the neighbourhood surrounding the Shinonome Laboratory. The station's relaxed, everyday atmosphere fits the show's cheerful slice-of-life spirit perfectly. Fans visiting for a pilgrimage can wander the surrounding streets to spot backdrops that inspired the animated scenery.
nearest_station: Tobu Isesaki Line / JR Ryomo Line Isesaki Station
access_note: 東武伊勢崎線またはJR両毛線伊勢崎駅すぐ

scene_description: ヒロインの夏希の親戚である陣内家の門のモデルとして登場する歴史ある公園である。
intro_short_en: Ueda Castle Ruins Park is believed to be the inspiration for the imposing gate of the Jinnouchi family estate in 'Summer Wars,' the proud clan that forms the heart of the film. The park's sturdy stone ramparts and serene castle grounds lend exactly the sense of deep-rooted family history that the Jinnouchi convey. It's a pleasant half-day visit from Nagano city, with beautiful cherry blossoms as a seasonal bonus in spring.
access_note: 北陸新幹線・上田電鉄上田駅から徒歩約15分

scene_description: 夜景が広がるシーンの舞台として登場。歴史的な赤レンガ倉庫と横浜港の美しい景観が作品の雰囲気を引き立てている。
intro_short_en: The historic Red Brick Warehouse along Yokohama's waterfront appears in 'Detective Conan' as the backdrop for a nighttime scene, its illuminated facade and harbour views lending the series a suitably atmospheric mood. The real building is a beautifully preserved Meiji-era landmark that today houses shops, restaurants, and event spaces. It's an easy and rewarding stop on any Yokohama itinerary, day or night.
nearest_station: JR Kannai Station / Minatomirai Line Bashamichi Station
access_note: JR関内駅から徒歩約15分、またはみなとみらい線馬車道駅から徒歩約6分

scene_description: マキマがデンジとパワーに説教をするシーンで登場した駅。日常的な駅前の風景が作中でも忠実に描かれている。
intro_short_en: Nerima Station appears in 'Chainsaw Man' as the setting for the memorable scene where Makima lectures Denji and Power, its ordinary commuter-town forecourt rendered faithfully in the anime. The contrast between the mundane station environment and the scene's tense dynamic is part of what makes the location so striking. Fans can stand on the same spot and feel the unsettling calm that Makima radiates throughout the series.
nearest_station: Seibu Ikebukuro Line / Toei Oedo Line Nerima Station
access_note: 西武池袋線・都営大江戸線練馬駅すぐ

scene_description: みーくんが登場するショッピングモールのモデルとして知られるスポット。劇中の印象的な場面の舞台となっている。
intro_short_en: This shopping complex in Kinshicho is widely recognised as the model for the mall that features in a key scene involving Mii-kun in 'School-Live!' Its distinctive multi-level atrium layout appears faithfully reproduced in the anime. Fans familiar with the series will find the real-life setting both familiar and strangely eerie given the show's premise.
nearest_station: JR Sobu Line / Tokyo Metro Hanzomon Line Kinshicho Station
access_note: JR総武線・東京メトロ半蔵門線錦糸町駅から徒歩約5分

anime_title_ja: 僕のヒーローアカデミア
scene_description: エンデヴァーがハイエンド脳無と激闘を繰り広げた舞台として登場。福岡を象徴するランドマークとして迫力ある戦闘シーンが描かれた。
intro_short_en: Fukuoka Tower serves as the dramatic backdrop for the fierce battle between Endeavor and the High-End Nomu in 'My Hero Academia,' its gleaming facade instantly recognisable as the city's most iconic landmark. The tower stands 234 m tall and offers panoramic views of Hakata Bay from its observation deck. Even outside the anime context it's one of Fukuoka's must-visit spots, and fans can look up at it and picture the intense fight that unfolded around it.
access_note: 福岡市地下鉄西新駅から徒歩約20分、またはバス「福岡タワー南口」バス停すぐ

scene_description: 野原家の最寄り駅として作中にたびたび登場する聖地。しんちゃんたちの日常を象徴する場所として、多くのファンに親しまれている。
intro_short_en: Kasukabe Station is the nearest station to the Nohara family home and appears repeatedly in 'Crayon Shin-chan' as part of the backdrop to their everyday life. It's one of Japan's best-loved anime pilgrimage spots, cherished by generations of fans for whom the name Kasukabe is inseparable from Shin-chan's world. The city itself has embraced its anime fame with Shin-chan-themed decorations and merchandise throughout the area.
nearest_station: Tobu Isesaki Line / Tobu Noda Line Kasukabe Station
access_note: 東武伊勢崎線・東武野田線春日部駅すぐ。浅草駅から東武線で約40分

scene_description: 軽音部が活動する桜が丘高校校舎のモデル。部室や階段を思わせる景色が今も残る。
intro_short_en: This lovingly preserved 1937 school building in Shiga Prefecture served as the main model for Sakuragaoka High School in 'K-On!', and the club room, staircases, and corridors are reproduced in the anime with striking accuracy. The site is now a community facility open to visitors, and a dedicated K-On! exhibition space makes it a must-visit for fans of the series. The rabbit-and-tortoise sculptures on the staircase railings are especially iconic.
access_note: 近江鉄道豊郷駅から徒歩約10分

scene_description: 折木奉太郎たちが暮らす神山市のモデル。古い町並みや宮川周辺が数多く登場する。
intro_short_en: The beautifully preserved old town of Takayama in Gifu Prefecture served as the model for the fictional Kamiyama City in 'Hyouka,' and its historic Sanmachi Suji streets, the Miyagawa riverside, and surrounding landscapes appear throughout the series. Wandering the same stone-paved lanes and wooden merchant houses that Oreki and Chitanda walk is a quietly satisfying experience that rewards attentive fans. Takayama is also one of Japan's most atmospheric towns in its own right, making this a pilgrimage well worth taking.
access_note: JR高山本線高山駅から徒歩圏内。名古屋から特急ひだで約2時間20分

anime_title_ja: ラブライブ！サンシャイン!!
scene_description: Aqoursの故郷として描かれた港町。海岸やバス停など作中そのままの風景が広がる。
intro_short_en: The small fishing port of Uchiura in Numazu, Shizuoka, serves as the real-world home of Aqours in 'Love Live! Sunshine!!', and its coastline, bus stops, and hillside streets appear throughout the series virtually unchanged. With Mt. Fuji visible on clear days across Suruga Bay, the scenery is every bit as beautiful as the anime suggests. The local community has warmly embraced its role as a pilgrimage destination, with fan-friendly signage and events.
nearest_station: JR Numazu Station (then bus to Uchiura area)
access_note: JR沼津駅からバスで内浦方面へ約40分

scene_description: アニメ制作会社が集まる街をモデルにした舞台。駅前やオフィス街が登場する。
intro_short_en: 'SHIROBAKO' draws on Musashino City and the surrounding Suginami-Koenji area as its model, reflecting the real concentration of animation studios in this part of west Tokyo. The station forecourt and office streets that appear in the series can still be found largely intact today. For anyone interested in the anime industry, a walk around this neighbourhood offers a tangible connection to the world depicted in the show.
access_note: JR中央線武蔵境駅すぐ

scene_description: 喜翆荘のモデルとなった温泉街。作品の放送後、聖地として全国的に有名になった。
intro_short_en: The secluded hot-spring village of Yuwaku Onsen on the outskirts of Kanazawa inspired the inn Kissuiso in 'Hanasaku Iroha,' and the town became nationally famous as a pilgrimage site after the series aired. The ryokan-lined streets and forested hillside setting closely match the atmosphere of the anime. The local community still hosts an annual 'Bonbori Festival' tied to the series, making it one of Japan's most community-embraced anime pilgrimage destinations.
nearest_station: JR Kanazawa Station (then bus to Yuwaku Onsen)
access_note: JR金沢駅からバスで湯涌温泉まで約40分

scene_description: 七瀬遙たちが泳ぐ海や駅のモデル。透明度の高い海岸が人気。
intro_short_en: The coastal town of Iwami in Tottori Prefecture, with its crystal-clear waters and small sandy coves, served as the model for Iwatobi's seaside and train station in 'Free!' The real beaches live up to the anime's depiction, with remarkable water clarity that makes them popular for swimming in summer. It's a scenic and relatively undiscovered corner of the San'in Coast that rewards the journey.
nearest_station: JR San'in Main Line Iwami Station
access_note: JR山陰本線岩美駅から徒歩またはタクシーで各海岸へ

scene_description: 小熊がスーパーカブで走る通学路や町並みが忠実に描かれている。
intro_short_en: The wide open roads and mountain-framed landscapes of Hokuto City in Yamanashi Prefecture are depicted with quiet faithfulness in 'Super Cub' as the routes Koguma rides on her daily commute. The town's spacious feel and clear air perfectly suit the series' meditative, unhurried pace. Fans who enjoy cycling or motorcycling can retrace the same roads with the Southern Alps as a backdrop.
access_note: JR中央線小淵沢駅からレンタサイクルまたはタクシー推奨

spot_name_ja: 旧小川小学校下里分校
spot_name_en: Former Ogawa Elementary School Shimosato Branch
scene_description: 旭丘分校のモデルとして知られ、作品ののどかな雰囲気を味わえる。
intro_short_en: This charmingly rustic former school building in Ogawa, Saitama, is the widely acknowledged model for Asahigaoka Branch School in 'Non Non Biyori.' The overgrown playground, wooden classroom, and surrounding countryside exude the same sleepy, pastoral warmth that defines the series. It's a peaceful spot for fans seeking the quiet countryside escape that the show so lovingly depicts.
access_note: 東武東上線小川町駅からバスまたはタクシー

scene_description: 上杉風太郎たちが利用する駅のモデルとして知られる。
intro_short_en: Otagawa Station in Aichi Prefecture is recognised as the model for the station used by Fuutarou Uesugi and the Nakano quintuplets in 'The Quintessential Quintuplets.' Its clean, modern design appears faithfully in the anime. Fans visiting the Nagoya area can make a short detour to stand on the same platform that inspired the series.
access_note: 名鉄常滑線太田川駅すぐ。名鉄名古屋駅から特急で約15分

spot_name_ja: 北海道帯広三条高等学校
anime_title_en: Kimi ni Todoke: From Me to You
scene_description: 爽子たちが通う高校のモデルの一つとされる場所。
intro_short_en: Hokkaido Obihiro Sanjo High School is cited as one of the models for the high school attended by Sawako and her friends in 'Kimi ni Todoke: From Me to You.' The school's setting in the wide, spacious landscape of Tokachi in eastern Hokkaido matches the open, unhurried world of the manga and anime. Fans making the trip to Obihiro can combine the visit with the region's renowned dairy produce and vast pastoral scenery.
nearest_station: JR Nemuro Main Line Obihiro Station
access_note: JR根室本線帯広駅からタクシーまたはバス

scene_description: 廃墟となった機関庫が印象的なシーンの舞台として登場する。
intro_short_en: The atmospheric ruins of Bungo-Mori Engine Shed in Oita Prefecture, a rare surviving example of a pre-war railway roundhouse, appear as a striking location in 'Suzume.' The weathered brick walls and rusted turntable create exactly the kind of hauntingly beautiful setting that the film so masterfully captures. The site is now partially open to visitors as a heritage park, and the quiet Kyushu countryside surrounding it adds to its reflective mood.
nearest_station: JR Kyudai Main Line Bungo-Mori Station
access_note: JR久大本線豊後森駅から徒歩約5分

scene_description: 帆高と陽菜が歩くシーンのモデルとして知られるスポット。
intro_short_en: The south exit area of Tabata Station is recognised as the setting for a scene in which Hodaka and Hina walk together in 'Weathering with You.' The neighbourhood's slightly removed, everyday feel suits the film's backdrop of a Tokyo experienced from its margins. It's a quiet stop compared with the film's more central locations and offers a different perspective on the city Shinkai depicts.
nearest_station: JR Yamanote Line / Keihin-Tohoku Line Tabata Station
access_note: JR山手線・京浜東北線田端駅南口すぐ

scene_description: ラストシーンで貴樹と明里がすれ違う象徴的な踏切のモデル。
intro_short_en: The level crossing near Sangubashi Station on the Odakyu Line is believed to be the model for the iconic final scene of '5 Centimeters per Second,' where Takaki and Akari pass each other one last time. The quiet suburban crossing, with trains rumbling past, carries an almost unbearable weight for fans who know the film. It's a small, unassuming spot whose emotional resonance far exceeds its modest surroundings.
access_note: 小田急小田原線参宮橋駅から徒歩約1分

anime_title_en: A Place Further than the Universe
scene_description: キマリたちの日常シーンで登場する駅のモデル。
intro_short_en: Tatebayashi Station in Gunma Prefecture serves as the model for the station that appears in the everyday scenes of 'A Place Further than the Universe,' the warmly celebrated series about four girls journeying to Antarctica. The station's calm, provincial atmosphere perfectly reflects the ordinary starting point from which Kimari and her friends launch their extraordinary adventure. Fans visiting can feel the contrast between this quiet daily-life setting and the vast distances the characters eventually cross.
access_note: 東武伊勢崎線館林駅すぐ

scene_description: 地学部の活動を象徴する施設として描かれる場所。
intro_short_en: The National Astronomical Observatory of Japan in Mitaka appears in 'Asteroid in Love' as a symbol of the earth sciences club's stargazing aspirations. The actual facility conducts cutting-edge astronomical research and opens parts of its historic campus to public tours, including the iconic 65-cm refractor telescope dome. It's a rewarding stop for fans of the series and anyone with an interest in astronomy.
access_note: JR中央線三鷹駅から徒歩約25分またはバス。一般公開日は要確認

scene_description: 主人公たちがサイクリングを楽しむ定番コースとして登場する。
intro_short_en: The Onedori Trunk Road, a wide cycling-friendly route running through the Tama hills of western Tokyo, is a staple cycling course in 'Long Riders!' where the main characters regularly train and ride for fun. The road's long straightaways and rolling gradients make it a favourite among real-life road cyclists too, giving fans an authentic way to experience the series. It's easily accessible from the Keio and Odakyu lines and connects to scenic countryside routes beyond.
access_note: 京王相模原線永山駅周辺から尾根幹線道路へアクセス可能
